case_title: JEFFREY L MALEK et al VS. ERIC DEMARCUS

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ERIC DEMARCUS IS GRANTED. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-04-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PARTIES AGREE TO SETTLE THE MATTER OR APPEAR ON FEBRUARY 4, 2014 AT 3:30 FOR JUDGMENT. MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED OCT-10-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DEMARCUS, ERIC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALEK, JEFFREY L AN INDIVIDUAL AND CO-PARTNER IN MALEK & MALEK, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MALEK, SANDRA L AN INDIVIDUAL AND CO-PARTNER IN MALEK & MALEK, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEMARCUS, ERIC $9,365.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,485.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY EXCEPT PLAINTIFF SANDRA MALEK WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 1/24/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,365.00 FILED BY MALEK, JEFFREY L AN INDIVIDUAL AND CO-PARTNER IN MALEK & MALEK, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MALEK, SANDRA L AN INDIVIDUAL AND CO-PARTNER IN MALEK & MALEK, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT DEMARCUS, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DEMARCUS, ERIC HEARING SET FOR JAN-23-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
